original_image_tags: A solid black page. In the upper-left corner, the alphanumeric code "1.4(a)" is printed in large, bold, red, sans-serif font. The rest of the page is entirely black, indicating full redaction under National Security Information exemption 1.4(a).

elements.description: A single page consisting of a solid black background with red text in the top left corner reading '1.4(a)'. The rest of the page is entirely black.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page is solid black with red text '1.4(a)' in the top-left corner, and there are no other visual elements, object counts, or quoted text to contradict.
